title: Neuromelanin staining (Fontana-Masson staining)+ TH-DAB staining on midbrain organoids
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d220m","text":"Fontana-Masson staining is a silver staining technique that is commonly used to identify melanin-containing cells. We combined it with DAB-TH staining that works by using an antibody to detect the presence of TH, followed by a reaction with a substrate (DAB) that results in the formation of a brown-colored product at the site of the antigen-antibody interaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"i786","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2v0ge","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9u68s","text":"methanol (MeOH)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1h9i4","text":"3% hydrogen peroxide ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e9k9n","text":"PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ftknj","text":"Triton-X 0.2% ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bh24k","text":"DAB solution ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3q4fp","text":"VECTASTAIN® Elite® ABC-HRP Kit","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"do11c","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"2rj3j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":958933,"guid":"43784198341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Fontana-Masson Stain Kit","mol_weight":0,"sku":"HT200-1KT","url":"https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/US/en/product/sigma/ht200","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":17,"name":"Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)","link":"http://sigmaaldrich.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Incubate human midbrain organoid sections in a fresh solution of 3:1 methanol (MeOH)/3% hydrogen peroxide at Room temperature for 00:20:00 .
Wash the slides and block it.
Apply primary antibodies in NGS 5% in PBS+ Triton-X 0.2% solution Overnight at 4 °C .
Next, wash slides.

Prepare ABC solution from Vectastain according to the manufacturer’s instructions (VECTASTAIN® Elite® ABC-HRP Kit, Peroxidase (Standard) PK-6100) and apply to sections for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Wash the slides.
Apply DAB solution to the sections at Room temperature for 30 seconds to 00:12:00 depending on when the visible reaction occurred.
For the visualization of neuromelanin, use the Fontana-Masson stain kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. (Fontana-Masson Stain Kit; Sigma‒Aldrich-HT200).
Eventually mount slides with synthetic resin.
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (1/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (2/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (3/3)
Then, block with NGS 10% in PBS+ Triton-X 0.2% for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (1/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (2/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (3/3)
Apply secondary antibodies to NGS 5% in PBS+ Triton-X 0.2% solution for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Prepare DAB solution according to the manufacturer’s instructions by diluting in 50 mL of 1x PBS with 50 µL of 3% H 2 O 2 .
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (1/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (2/3)
Wash the slides in PBS for 00:05:00 . (3/3)
creator: Federico Bertoli
